DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF RUSTY CABUTOTAN MOTION TO DEEM MATTERS ADMITTED AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION, SET ONE, NOS. 1-12 ARE DEEMED ADMITTED. THE REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED AGAINST THE DEFENDANT, INDIVIDUALLY, IN THE AMOUNT OF $810.00, PAYABLE WITHIN 10 DAYS. THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER REPEATING VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312 TO JUDGE PRO TEM NOAH LEBOWITZ BY EMAIL AT NOAH@NDLLEGAL.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: NOAH LEBOWITZ; CLERK: WILLIAM TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF RUSTY CABUTOTAN MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES AND DOCUMENTS TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED. VERIFIED RESPONSES, WITHOUT OBJECTIONS, TO BE SERVED WITHIN 10 DAYS. THE REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED AGAINST THE DEFENDANT, INDIVIDUALLY, IN THE AMOUNT OF $622.00, PAYABLE WITHIN 10 DAYS. THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER REPEATING VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312 TO JUDGE PRO TEM NOAH LEBOWITZ BY EMAIL AT NOAH@NDLLEGAL.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: NOAH LEBOWITZ; CLERK: WILLIAM TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF RUSTY CABUTOTAN MOTION TO COMPEL INTERROGATORIES IS GRANTED. VERIFIED RESPONSES, WITHOUT OBJECTIONS, TO BE SERVED WITHIN 10 DAYS. THE REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED AGAINST THE DEFENDANT, INDIVIDUAL, IN THE AMOUNT OF $622.00, PAYABLE WITHIN 10 DAYS. THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER REPEATING VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312 TO JUDGE PRO TEM NOAH LEBOWITZ BY EMAIL AT NOAH@NDLLEGAL.COM. calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-05-2020 Vacated

Motion To Deem Matters Admitted And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-20-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Joseph Weinberger, Esq., Weinberger Law, 916-599-1591, appearing for Plaintiff; CourtCall
Michael J. Smith, Esq., Law Offices of Carbone, Smith & Koyama, appearing for Defendant Glenen Hildebrand;

Hearing is held and argued as to the issue of sanctions. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF RUSTY CABUTOTAN Motion To Deem Matters Admitted And Request For Sanctions

The motion is GRANTED. Requests for Admission, Set One, Nos. 1-12 are deemed admitted. The request for sanctions is GRANTED against the defendant, individually, in the amount of $810.00, payable within 10 days. The prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312 to Judge Pro Tem Noah Lebowitz by email at noah@ndllegal.com. Judge Pro Tem: Noah Lebowitz; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)

Motion To Compel Responses And Documents To Request For Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Dec-20-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Joseph Weinberger, Esq., Weinberger Law, 916-599-1591, appearing for Plaintiff; CourtCall
Michael J. Smith, Esq., Law Offices of Carbone, Smith & Koyama, appearing for Defendant Glenen Hildebrand;

Hearing is held and argued as to the issue of sanctions. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF RUSTY CABUTOTAN Motion To Compel Responses And Documents To Request For Production Of Documents

The motion is GRANTED. Verified responses, without objections, to be served within 10 days. The request for sanctions is GRANTED against the defendant, individually, in the amount of $622.00, payable within 10 days. The prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312 to Judge Pro Tem Noah Lebowitz by email at noah@ndllegal.com. Judge Pro Tem: Noah Lebowitz; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)
